commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7adc4f8a7eaf90c04bfa65050d5d81333810deab)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `TurnSurfacePolicy` helper and applies it to embedded agent tool construction, Gateway scoped tool resolution, Codex dynamic tool filtering, and related tests.

PR surface: Source +188, Tests +106. Total +294 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level regressions: current main force-adds `message` for message-tool-only turns and uses group/glob matcher semantics, while the PR changes those paths. I did not run a live channel turn, so real behavior proof remains missing.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are compatibility/product-contract decisions plus contributor real behavior proof, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: Add TurnSurfacePolicy v0 for per-turn tool surface gating
target.body:
## Summary

- add `TurnSurfacePolicy` to compile per-turn `toolsAllow` / `excludeToolNames` into an effective model-facing tool surface
- filter gateway requested tools and forced `message` before they widen scoped surfaces
- apply the same surface policy across embedded runtime tool construction, bundled/effective tools, tool-search catalog results, and Codex app-server forced dynamic tool handling

## Boundary

This change keeps the gate on the OpenClaw runtime/chief side. It does not modify `finance_research` and does not make `finance_research` the owner of web/browser/provider/memory/write surface gating.

## Tests

- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/turn-surface-policy.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts src/gateway/tool-resolution.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
  - unit-fast: 2 files / 27 tests passed
  - gateway: 1 file / 6 tests passed
- `corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-codex.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts`
  - 1 file / 232 tests passed
- `corepack pnpm tsgo:core` passed
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo` passed
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo` passed
- `git diff --check HEAD^ HEAD` passed

## Known existing blocker

`corepack pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false` currently fails with an existing TS4058 outside this PR's diff:

`src/secrets/config-io.ts(8,17): error TS4058: Return type of exported function has or is using name 'configWritePostCommitRollback' from external module ".../src/config/io" but cannot be named.`
target.author: joohyeon-econ

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
